headline: The 'Time To Power' Signal The Market Missed In Bloom Energy Stock
summary: It’s the kind of chart that makes you check if you’ve had too much coffee. From June 25, 2025, to Jun 26, 2026, Bloom Energy (BE) stock put on a +1066% gain, leaving even its peers in the dust. Looking back, it’s easy to chalk it up to the AI frenzy. But the more interesting story is that the core thesis for the surge was openly broadcast, repeatedly, on the company’s earnings calls.
